touches.ai_summary: Cold outreach to Ivy Williams at RidgeHealth introducing our revenue forecasting solution. Highlighted common pain points in healthcare IT sales cycles and inaccurate pipeline visibility.

Initial qualification call with Ivy Williams. She confirmed RidgeHealth is struggling with forecast accuracy and currently evaluating solutions including Clari. Discussed team size and current process.

questions_asked.question: What's driving your search for a forecasting solution right now?
questions_asked.answer: Our forecast variance is 30%+ and the exec team has lost confidence in our pipeline visibility.

questions_asked.question: How does your solution differ from Clari?
questions_asked.answer: We focus on AI-driven deal scoring with real-time risk signals, while Clari emphasizes collaboration workflows.

touches.ai_summary: Brief follow-up call to confirm Ivy reviewed the materials and answer quick questions about implementation timeline.

questions_asked.question: What's the typical implementation timeline?
questions_asked.answer: 4-6 weeks for initial setup, with progressive rollout to the sales team.

next_steps: Schedule discovery call for next week

touches.ai_summary: Sent discovery call prep email with agenda and requested information about their current tech stack, CRM setup, and team structure.
Follow-up email with case study from similar healthcare IT company showing 45% improvement in forecast accuracy.
Sent pre-discovery confirmation with Zoom link and requested stakeholder list for broader evaluation process.

questions_asked.question: Will you have other stakeholders joining the discovery call?
questions_asked.answer: Just me for now - I want to vet the solution before bringing in the broader team.

touches.ai_summary: Brief email confirming discovery call logistics and sharing link to product sandbox for Ivy to explore.
Short discovery call focused on current pain points. Ivy described their manual forecasting process and mentioned 22 seats needed across RevOps and sales management.

questions_asked.question: Walk me through your current forecasting process.
questions_asked.answer: Mostly manual spreadsheets aggregated from Salesforce, updated weekly. Takes about 6 hours per week.

touches.ai_summary: Demo confirmation email with customized agenda based on discovery insights. Highlighted forecasting accuracy and deal risk detection features.

Comprehensive product demo covering core forecasting features, AI deal scoring, and integration with Salesforce. Ivy was engaged and asked detailed questions about data requirements and accuracy metrics.

questions_asked.question: What historical data do you need to train the AI models?
questions_asked.answer: Minimum 6 months of closed deals, ideally 12+ months for better accuracy. We can work with your data quality.

questions_asked.question: How does the pricing compare to Clari for our team size?
questions_asked.answer: We're typically 20-30% lower for comparable features, with more flexible packaging.

questions_asked.question: What's your evaluation timeline and decision process?
questions_asked.answer: Need to present to CFO and CRO by end of quarter. Budget is approved but they want to see the ROI case.

objections: Need to see integration with our custom Salesforce fields and workflows

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up demo session focused on Salesforce integration and custom field mapping. Meeting was rescheduled once due to Ivy's conflict.

questions_asked.question: Can we map our custom health score fields into your risk model?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, our platform supports custom field integration with configurable weighting.

next_steps: Introduce solutions engineer for technical validation

touches.ai_summary: Sent ROI analysis showing projected $180K annual value from improved forecast accuracy and reduced sales cycle time. Requested meeting with executive stakeholders.

questions_asked.question: When can we schedule time with your CFO and CRO to walk through the business case?
questions_asked.answer: Let me check their calendars - they're slammed this week but should have time next week.

touches.ai_summary: Executive alignment meeting with Ivy. CFO and CRO did not attend - Ivy mentioned they're reviewing the materials offline and she's advocating internally. Discussed business case and implementation approach.

questions_asked.question: What's the best way to get time with your CFO and CRO directly?
questions_asked.answer: They've asked me to drive this evaluation. If we get to final agreement they'll sign off, but they trust my recommendation.

questions_asked.question: What's your implementation support model?
questions_asked.answer: Dedicated CSM for first 90 days, plus ongoing support and quarterly business reviews.

touches.ai_summary: Proposal review call with Ivy. Walked through pricing for 22 seats with automations plus consulting package at $24,900 ACV. Ivy indicated this is above budget.

questions_asked.question: Is there flexibility on pricing? Our approved budget is closer to $18K.
questions_asked.answer: Let me discuss with our leadership - we may be able to adjust the consulting hours or explore a phased approach.

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up proposal call to discuss modified package options. Presented three tiers including reduced consulting to hit budget constraints.

questions_asked.question: Would a self-service implementation model work if we reduce consulting hours?
questions_asked.answer: Possibly, but we'd need strong documentation and on-demand support access.

objections: Concerned about implementation success without full consulting support
next_steps: Prepare revised proposal at $17,700 with reduced consulting

touches.ai_summary: Executive check-in meeting with Ivy to align on revised proposal and timeline. Still no direct engagement from CFO/CRO. Discussed competitive position vs Clari.

questions_asked.question: Where does Clari stand in your evaluation?
questions_asked.answer: They're quoting higher but some folks internally like their brand recognition. I think your product is stronger for our use case.

questions_asked.question: Can you include more onboarding support at the revised price point?
questions_asked.answer: We can add 2 extra implementation sessions and extend CSM support to 120 days.

touches.ai_summary: Pricing negotiation call focused on final contract terms. Discussed discount justification and multi-year options to reduce Year 1 pricing.

questions_asked.question: Would a 2-year commitment unlock better pricing?
questions_asked.answer: Yes - we could hold pricing flat for Year 2 and reduce Year 1 by another 5%.

questions_asked.question: What would help you finalize this internally by end of quarter?
questions_asked.answer: Honestly just need to get final CFO signoff. The business case is solid, it's just a busy time.

next_steps: Send final proposal with multi-year option

touches.ai_summary: Negotiation call to finalize 1-year deal at $17,700. Ivy confirmed this fits budget and she can get approval. Discussed contract terms and payment schedule.

questions_asked.question: Can we do quarterly payments instead of annual upfront?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we can structure quarterly billing with a 3% processing fee.

next_steps: Send contract with quarterly payment terms

touches.ai_summary: Final negotiation call on contract details. Ivy raised questions about auto-renewal terms and cancellation policy. Agreed to mutual 60-day out clause.

questions_asked.question: What's the cancellation policy if this doesn't deliver results?
questions_asked.answer: Standard 60-day notice. We're confident in the ROI but want you to feel protected.

objections: Legal wants more flexible exit terms than standard auto-renewal

touches.ai_summary: Confirmation email with final contract incorporating agreed terms. Sent to Ivy for internal routing to legal and CFO for signature.
